title: Supermarkets
questions: What springs to mind when you hear the word 'supermarket'?
Which are better - big supermarkets, small grocery stores or outdoor markets?
Do you like visiting supermarkets in other countries?
What single improvement do you think would make your local supermarket better?
What do you think it would be like to work in a supermarket?
Do you like the music in supermarkets?
What do you think about when you are in a supermarket?
Why do you think men hate supermarkets?
Have you ever had a bad or embarrassing experience in a supermarket?
Do you like the advertisements for supermarkets on television?
If you had 60 seconds to fill your supermarket trolley for free, what would you fill it with?
How often do you go to the supermarket?
What are the supermarkets like in your home town?
Do you go to other places than supermarkets to buy food?
How much do you typically spend at the supermarket each time?
Would you like to own a supermarket? Why or why not?
